title: Modified Phenol Chloroform Genomic DNA Extraction Protocol
author: Shelby J Barnes
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.b5iiq4ce
materials: Invert samples thoroughly before centrifuge step.
Invert sample thoroughly before centrifuge step.

steps.title: Start with filtered cells OR spin...
steps.instruction: Start with filtered cells OR spin to get pellet from liquid culture.

steps.title: Pipette off supernatant, if any
steps.instruction: Pipette off supernatant, if any.

steps.title: Add 380 uL 1x TE Buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 380 uL 1x TE Buffer + 20 uL Lysozyme to sample.

steps.title: Incubate for 1 h at 37˚C
steps.instruction: Incubate for 1 h at 37˚C.

steps.title: Add 60 uL SDS + 30...
steps.instruction: Add 60 uL SDS + 30 uL Proteinase K + 110 uL 1x TE Buffer (total volume = 600 uL) to sample.

steps.title: Incubate for 2 h at 37˚C
steps.instruction: Incubate for 2 h at 37˚C.

steps.title: Vortex tube thoroughly
steps.instruction: Vortex tube thoroughly.

steps.title: Incubate at 37˚C for 1 h...
steps.instruction: Incubate at 37˚C for 1 h , or until samples are clear.

steps.title: Incubate at 65˚C for 30 min to inactivate Proteinase K
steps.instruction: Incubate at 65˚C for 30 min to inactivate Proteinase K.

steps.title: Stop here and store at -20˚C or move to extraction
steps.instruction: Stop here and store at -20˚C or move to extraction.

steps.title: Add equal volume (600 uL) of...
steps.instruction: Add equal volume (600 uL) of Phenol Chloroform Isoamyl alcohol (P/C/I) to sample.

steps.title: Spin at 10,640 rcf for 10 min
steps.instruction: Spin at 10,640 rcf for 10 min.

steps.title: Transfer aqueous phase (top layer) to new tube
steps.instruction: Transfer aqueous phase (top layer) to new tube.

steps.title: Transfer approx
steps.instruction: Transfer approx. 500 - 600 uL in 100 uL increments.

steps.title: Add equal volume of Chloroform Isoamyl alcohol (C/I) to sample
steps.instruction: Add equal volume of Chloroform Isoamyl alcohol (C/I) to sample.

steps.title: Spin at 10,640 rcf for 10 min
steps.instruction: Spin at 10,640 rcf for 10 min.

steps.title: Transfer aqueous phase (top layer) to new tube
steps.instruction: Transfer aqueous phase (top layer) to new tube.

steps.title: Store at -20˚C or move to ethanol precipitation
steps.instruction: Store at -20˚C or move to ethanol precipitation.

steps.title: Add 2 volumes of ice cold 100% Ethanol to sample
steps.instruction: Add 2 volumes of ice cold 100% Ethanol to sample.

steps.title: E
steps.instruction: E.g. Have 50 uL of DNA solution, add 100 uL Ethanol.

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.1 volumes of 3M Sodium Acetate pH 5.2 to sample.

steps.title: E
steps.instruction: E.g. Have 50 uL DNA solution, add 5 uL Sodium Acetate.

steps.title: Incubate at -20˚C for at least 1 hr
steps.instruction: Incubate at -20˚C for at least 1 hr.

steps.title: Cold incubation for a longer period of time (e
steps.instruction: Cold incubation for a longer period of time (e.g. over night) may lead to higher yield.

steps.title: Spin at 13,000 rcf for 30 min at 4˚C
steps.instruction: Spin at 13,000 rcf for 30 min at 4˚C .

steps.title: Should see small white pellet
steps.instruction: Should see small white pellet. If tube is placed hinge-side outward, the pellet should be found below the hinge and almost to the bottom.

steps.title: Pipette off supernatant
steps.instruction: Pipette off supernatant.

steps.title: Gently add 150 uL of 70% ethanol to remove salts
steps.instruction: Gently add 150 uL of 70% ethanol to remove salts.

steps.title: Do not dislodge pellet
steps.instruction: Do not dislodge pellet. Keeping the samples on ice or in cold tube racks will help pellet stay in place.

steps.title: Spin at 13,000 rcf for 10 min at 4˚C
steps.instruction: Spin at 13,000 rcf for 10 min at 4˚C .

steps.title: Pipette off supernatant
steps.instruction: Pipette off supernatant.

steps.title: Spin at 13,000 rcf for 1...
steps.instruction: Spin at 13,000 rcf for 1 min to bring down any excess ethanol.

steps.title: Pipette off any remaining liquid
steps.instruction: Pipette off any remaining liquid.

steps.title: Dry pellet for 5 min MAX
steps.instruction: Dry pellet for 5 min MAX.

steps.title: Resuspend pellet in 50 uL Molecular Bio water
steps.instruction: Resuspend pellet in 50 uL Molecular Bio water.

steps.title: Use 1- 3 uL of DNA...
steps.instruction: Use 1- 3 uL of DNA to quantify using Qubit HS dsDNA assay kit.

steps.title: Store at -20˚C
steps.instruction: Store at -20˚C .
